subject: 🏃 Tuesday — Upper Push
html:
Today: Upper Push — Week 2 of Chassis Build. Pure upper-body maintenance, no lower body. You're in the gym, so this one's quick — about 25 minutes. Knee has been Green across five straight sessions now (Apr 21 through Apr 24 run), so the chassis work is clearly stabilizing things. Thursday you step up to 4 miles for the first time this cycle. Today just get the upper work in, stay loose, and do your daily mobility flush either before or after.

Focus cue: Push-ups — last session (Apr 21) you had to break up sets 2 and 3 to hit 15 reps. That's the progression gate: clean, unbroken 3×15 before we consider feet-elevated. Today, if you feel set 2 slipping, pause at the top (arms locked) for 2 breaths rather than dropping to knees. Own the rest position.

Context: Week 2 of 4 in Chassis Build — 17 days to your May 15 PT follow-up, 89 days to race day. Yesterday was Hip & Core A with progressed isometric holds. Tomorrow is Mobility Deep-Dive.

Dynamic Warm-Up:
Arm circles: 10 each direction | Shoulder rolls: 10 forward, 10 back | Scapular retractions: 10 reps | Cat-cow: 10 reps | Band pull-aparts or chest openers: 10 reps | Dead hangs: 2 × 10 sec

Workout — 3 × 10–12 each:

ExerciseWeightSets × Reps
Dumbbell bench press30 lbs/hand (regular gym) or 25 lbs/hand (home)3 × 10–12
Overhead press25 lbs/hand3 × 10–12
Push-upsBodyweight (flat)3 × 15 (progression target: unbroken)
Lateral raise10 lbs3 × 10–12
Tricep overhead extension25 lbs (single DB, two-handed)3 × 10–12

Daily Mobility Flush (~12 min) — do before or after the session:
Foam roller T-spine extensions (PT): 8–10 reps | Standing lunges w/ hip IR + extension (PT): 8–10 reps each side | World's greatest stretch: 5 each side | 90/90 hip stretch (IR emphasis): 60 sec each side | Half-kneeling couch stretch: 60 sec each side | Hip CARs: 3 each direction, each leg | Cat-cow: 10 reps
